articles.title: Kotak upgrades Hindalco to 'Buy', sees 17% upside on aluminium and Novelis recovery
articles.summary: Kotak Institutional Equities upgraded Hindalco from 'Reduce' to 'Buy' with a revised target of INR 1,120 per share (17% upside), citing improving earnings visibility, Novelis' Oswego hot mill restart, healthier US scrap spreads, and a projected global aluminium supply deficit of 900,000 tonnes in 2026. The brokerage values Hindalco at approximately 5.5x FY28 EV/EBITDA following a recent correction in the share price.

articles.title: Stellantis Q2 2026 estimated consolidated shipments of 1.6 million units, +10% year-over-year
articles.summary: Stellantis reported estimated Q2 2026 consolidated shipments of 1.6 million units, up 10% year-over-year, driven by North America (+38% YoY on Ram and Jeep refreshes) and Enlarged Europe (+5% YoY with BEV as primary driver). Full financial results are scheduled for release on 30 July 2026.
articles.novelis_angle: A 10% annual rebound in Stellantis shipments is a direct positive signal for automotive BIW aluminium sheet and battery enclosure demand from one of Novelis's largest European OEM customers, reinforcing the H2 2026 demand outlook.

articles.title: China's NFC produces first aluminium at Vietnam smelter
articles.summary: NFC's Dak Nong smelter in Vietnam tapped its first molten primary aluminium on 16 July, 50 days ahead of the contractual milestone. The 450,000 tpy facility enters Phase 1 at 150,000 tpy, ramping to full capacity by 2027–2028, becoming Vietnam's first large-scale electrolytic aluminium plant.
articles.novelis_angle: While Phase 1 output is modest at 150 kt, the full 450 kt ramp adds a new Southeast Asian P1020 source that could soften European aluminium premiums over the medium term as geopolitical supply constraints ease.
